# Test fixtures

## `sample-vf.ttf`

A tiny (~6K) weight-variable font used by `test_split.py`. Built by interpolating the committed OFL Inter donors in `examples/minimal/donors/` (Thin/Regular/Black) into a single `wght` 100–900 axis, then subsetting to a handful of glyphs (`A a B b G g space . 0`). It carries the placeholder family name "STV Sample".

Derived from Inter, which is licensed under the SIL Open Font License 1.1 — see `examples/minimal/donors/OFL.txt` for the license text.
